economic_notes: Upper Nicola Band wholly owns Upper Nicola Holdings Limited Partnership (GBE). Has 12.50% interest in Stuwix Resources Joint Venture (revenue $19.8M, contract services paid to UNB $376,627). Holds 20% equity in Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership. Major commitment: Quilchena Community Centre construction contract with Unitech Construction Management Ltd. for $39,679,969 total, $1,820,504 expended to date, remaining commitment $37,859,465.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to unrecorded asset retirement obligations (Note 15) - auditors could not determine the effect on expenses, net financial assets, or accumulated surplus. GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Upper Nicola Holdings Limited Partnership (wholly owned), Stuwix Resources Joint Venture (12.5% interest), and Spayum Holdings Limited Partnership (20% interest). Large construction commitment for Quilchena Community Centre ($37.86M remaining). Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($7,453,107) + ISC deferred from prior year ($3,794,710) + FNHA ($1,539,147) + CMHC ($1,275,000) + Other Province of BC ($1,056,575) + FNESC ($438,355) + CMHC subsidy ($91,793) - ISC deferred to future year ($-4,985,167) - Other deferred to future year ($-4,142,175) = net ~$6,521,345 recognized; however revenue lines show gross amounts so total_government_transfers calculated as sum of all government transfer revenue lines before deferral netting: ISC $7,453,107 + FNHA $1,539,147 + CMHC $1,275,000 + Other Province BC $1,056,575 + FNESC $438,355 + CMHC subsidy $91,793 + ISC deferred from prior $3,794,710 + Other deferred from prior $946,602 = $16,595,289 gross; OSR calculated as total revenue $15,025,665 minus estimated net government transfers. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text. Restricted cash within cash and equivalents: $561,022 CMHC reserves.
